# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: 'azurearm'
      name: 'CI CD Service Principal'
      type: 'Microsoft.Azure.Security.InitiateServicePrincipal'
      properties:
        servicePrincipalNames:
          - myCI CDSP
        displayName: 'My CI/CD Service Principal'
        password: '<generated-password>'

    - apiVersion: 'azurearm'
      name: 'Assign Contributor Role to Service Principal at Subscription Level'
      type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/subscribeToRole'
      properties:
        roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c' # Contributor role ID
        scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'
        principalId: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Azure.Security", "initiatedServicePrincipals", "<resource-id-of-the-created-service-principal>")]'
